program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Inventory the RP00 Product Constitution And AI Control Plane acceptance sources, owned concepts, non-goals, authority boundaries, validation commands, and blocked-claim risks.
claude_questions: Does the control-plane contract clearly prevent planning artifacts from being treated as production implementation?
Does the authority boundary keep Hermes as evidence/validation only and Claude Code as read-only review only?
Does the subphase include enough local validation to avoid packet-only validation theater?
Are the blocked-claim rules strong enough for scope drift, AI write without review, and harness/product boundary confusion?
Is anything missing before RP00.P00.M00.S01 can be promoted from implemented to production_ready?

finding_routing.P0_BLOCKER: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P1_MUST_FIX: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P2_SHOULD_FIX: fix now or defer with owner, target RP/subphase, and rationale
finding_routing.P3_NOTE: record or defer with owner and target phase
